title: premna cordifolia
intro: Premna cordifolia, also known as Hindi name 'Brahmi', is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Premna cordifolia include reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Premna cordifolia include teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
